name: yt-streamer-webapp
description: Self-hosted MJPEG streamer for m3u8 playlists and YouTube downloads, deployable behind Cloudflare Tunnel. Tesla-browser optimized.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/lib/store.js && node --check src/lib/ytdlp.js && node --check src/lib/stream.js && node --check src/lib/processed-library.js && node --check public/app.js
